sourceLabel: Bundled teaching catalog for rosbridge-connected systems

cards.title: Topics are streams
cards.detail: Pick one topic, inspect its message type, then compare the publishers and subscribers shown in the detail view.

cards.title: Services are request/response
cards.detail: Select a service, load a request template, call it, and then look for resulting topic or log changes.

cards.title: Begin with a harmless topic
cards.detail: Use `std_msgs/String` or another simple message type first, then publish a small JSON payload and watch the stream panel.

cards.title: Run the example teaching workspace
cards.detail: The companion `ROS2-Workspace/` folder starts rosbridge, rosapi, and demo nodes for this UI.
